blocking_export_risks: Curve paths and mRNA squiggle curves need conversion to mesh strips, Beams, or Attachment-driven effects for Roblox.
Transparent route guides and nucleoplasm may sort differently in Roblox Studio and need viewport validation.
Cargo keyframes and NPC_GatePulse_Controller custom properties must be translated into Roblox tween/event logic.
The inherited nucleus scene remains dense and needs LOD grouping before full import.
recommended_roblox_plan: Export cargo tokens as separate named mesh groups under Transport_Cargo.
Represent route guides as Roblox Beams with Attachments at pore centers and cargo endpoints.
Map NPC_GatePulse_Controller gate_pulse keyframes to a Roblox animation event table.
Keep direction arrows and route guides toggleable as teaching overlays.
